A

addButtonClickedActionListener(ButtonClickedActionListener) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Add a ButtonClickedActionListener to the button.
addSplitButtonActionListener(SplitButtonActionListener) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Deprecated.
Since 1.3.0; use JSplitButton.addButtonClickedActionListener(ButtonClickedActionListener) or JSplitButton.addSplitButtonClickedActionListener(SplitButtonClickedActionListener) instead.
addSplitButtonClickedActionListener(SplitButtonClickedActionListener) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Add a SplitButtonClickedActionListener to the button.

B

buttonClicked(ActionEvent) - Method in interface com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action.SplitButtonActionListener
Invoked when the button part is clicked.
ButtonClickedActionListener - Interface in com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action
The listener interface for receiving the button clicked ActionEvent.

C

com.alexandriasoftware.swing - package com.alexandriasoftware.swing
Swing implementation of a split button and JavaBean information for using it in an IDE.
com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action - package com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action
EventListeners for JSplitButton.

G

getArrowColor() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Gets the color of the arrow.
getArrowSize() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Gets the size of the arrow.
getBeanDescriptor() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
Gets the bean's BeanDescriptors.
getDefaultEventIndex() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
A bean may have a "default" event that is the event that will mostly commonly be used by human's when using the bean.
getDefaultPropertyIndex() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
A bean may have a "default" property that is the property that will mostly commonly be initially chosen for update by human's who are customizing the bean.
getDisabledArrowColor() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Gets the disabled arrow color.
getDisabledImage() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Gets the disabled image to be drawn in the split part.
getEventSetDescriptors() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
Gets the bean's EventSetDescriptors.
getIcon(int) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
This method returns an image object that can be used to represent the bean in toolboxes, toolbars, etc.
getImage() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Gets the image to be drawn in the split part.
getMethodDescriptors() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
Gets the bean's MethodDescriptors.
getPopupMenu() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Returns the JPopupMenu if set, null otherwise.
getPropertyDescriptors() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
Gets the bean's PropertyDescriptors.
getSeparatorSpacing() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Returns the separatorSpacing.
getSplitWidth() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Splitwidth is the width of the split part of the button.

I

isAlwaysDropDown() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Deprecated.
Since 1.3.0; use JSplitButton.isAlwaysPopup() instead.
isAlwaysPopup() - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Show the popup menu, if attached, even if the button part is clicked.

J

JSplitButton - Class in com.alexandriasoftware.swing
An implementation of a "split" button.
JSplitButton(String, Icon) - Constructor for class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Creates a button with initial text and an icon.
JSplitButton(String) - Constructor for class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Creates a button with text.
JSplitButton(Icon) - Constructor for class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Creates a button with an icon.
JSplitButton() - Constructor for class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Creates a button with no set text or icon.
JSplitButtonBeanInfo - Class in com.alexandriasoftware.swing
 
JSplitButtonBeanInfo() - Constructor for class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButtonBeanInfo
 

R

removeButtonClickedActionListener(ButtonClickedActionListener) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Remove a ButtonClickedActionListener from the button.
removeSplitButtonActionListener(SplitButtonActionListener) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Deprecated.
Since 1.3.0; use JSplitButton.removeButtonClickedActionListener(ButtonClickedActionListener) or JSplitButton.removeSplitButtonClickedActionListener(SplitButtonClickedActionListener) instead.
removeSplitButtonClickedActionListener(SplitButtonClickedActionListener) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Remove a SplitButtonClickedActionListener from the button.

S

setAlwaysDropDown(boolean) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Deprecated.
Since 1.3.0; use JSplitButton.setAlwaysPopup(boolean) instead.
setAlwaysPopup(boolean) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Show the popup menu, if attached, even if the button part is clicked.
setArrowColor(Color) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Set the arrow color.
setArrowSize(int) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Sets the size of the arrow.
setDisabledArrowColor(Color) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Sets the disabled arrow color.
setDisabledImage(Image) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Sets the disabled image to draw instead of the triangle.
setImage(Image) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Sets the image to draw instead of the triangle.
setPopupMenu(JPopupMenu) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Sets the JPopupMenu to be displayed, when the split part of the button is clicked.
setSeparatorSpacing(int) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Sets the separatorSpacing.
setSplitWidth(int) - Method in class com.alexandriasoftware.swing.JSplitButton
Splitwidth is the width of the split part of the button.
SplitButtonActionListener - Interface in com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action
The listener interface for receiving action events.
splitButtonClicked(ActionEvent) - Method in interface com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action.SplitButtonActionListener
Invoked when split part is clicked.
SplitButtonClickedActionListener - Interface in com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action
The listener interface for receiving the split clicked ActionEvent.
